title: La monaca di Monza
writer: Lucia Drudi Demby, Carmine Gallone, Giuseppe Mangione
actors: Giovanna Ralli, Gabriele Ferzetti, Mario Feliciani
plot: Virginia de Leyva, daughter of a Spanish Lord, becomes a nun in Monza, in 1600s. She becomes very strict with herself and the students until she's unable to resist a romance with the nobleman Gian Paolo Osio which will lead both t...
